back_translation: Because I want you to know how greatly I am struggling for you, and for the people in the city of Laodicea, and for everyone who has not yet seen my face in person

So that their hearts may receive encouragement, being knit together in love, and reaching all the riches of the full assurance that comes from understanding — that is, the true knowledge of the mystery of God, namely, Lord Christ
In Him, all the treasures of wisdom and knowledge are hidden
I say this so that no one may deceive you with words that sound persuasive
Although I am not present with you in body, I am present with you in spirit; I rejoice to see your orderly way of life and your firm faith in Lord Christ
Therefore, just as you have received Lord Jesus Christ as Lord, so walk in life in Him
Rooted and built up in Him, and firm in faith just as you were taught, and overflowing with thanksgiving
Watch out, lest anyone take you away as captives by philosophy and empty deception, according to human tradition, according to the basic principles of the world, and not according to Lord Christ
Because in Lord Christ, all the fullness of God dwells in bodily form
And in Him, you have received fullness; He is the head over every ruler and authority
In Him, you also received circumcision that is not by human hands — that is, the stripping away of the body of the flesh — through the circumcision of Lord Christ
You were buried with Him through baptism, and in Him you were also raised from the dead together with Him through faith in the power of God who raised Him from the dead
And you who used to be dead in your trespasses and in the uncircumcision of your flesh, God has made you alive together with Lord Christ, by forgiving all your trespasses to us
He erased the debt-document that condemned us — that is, the account that stood against us — and took it away from the middle, by nailing it to the cross
He stripped away the power of the rulers and authorities, publicly exposed them, and led them in the procession of triumph by the cross
Therefore, do not let anyone judge you in matters of eating or drinking, or in the matter of festivals or the new-moon-day or the Sabbath day
These things are merely a shadow of what is to come; but the body that is the source of that shadow is Lord Christ

Do not let anyone disqualify you from your prize — those who delight in false humility and the worship of angels, immersing themselves in what they have seen, being puffed up without cause by the thinking of their own fleshly mind
He does not hold firmly to the head — that is, the One from whom the entire body is nourished and bound together by joints and ligaments, in order to grow with the growth that comes from God
If you have died together with Lord Christ to be free from the basic principles of the world, then why do you still submit to regulations as though you are still living in this world
‘Do not handle, do not taste, do not touch’
These things will all perish when used, according to the rules and teachings of humans
These regulations have an appearance of wisdom — with self-devised worship, false humility, and severe harsh treatment of the body — but they have no value in resisting the indulgence of the flesh
